overall.summary: 近期多則利好消息推動鴻海股價，Nvidia AI 需求提升、蘋果發表會受惠及外資回流，整體看法偏正向。

details.title: Nvidia AI Outlook Lifts Asian Chip Suppliers
details.content_summary: This article first appeared on GuruFocus. Nvidia's (NVDA, Financials) upbeat outlook for artificial intelligence demand continued to lift parts of the Asian semiconductor supply chain. Warning! GuruFocus has detected 5 Warning Signs with NVDA. Is NVDA fairly valued? Test your thesis with our free DCF calculator. Shares of several suppliers moved higher after Nvidia reported stronger-than-expected quarterly results and signaled that demand for AI chips remains resilient. Positive comments from Advanced Micro Devices CEO Lisa Su on AI demand also helped support sentiment. The rally included companies tied to chip manufacturing, electronic components and specialty materials. Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Co., a major supplier to Nvidia and AMD, edged higher after a stronger move in the previous session. Foxconn also gained. Japanese suppliers saw broader strength, with Murata Manufacturing, Sumco, Shin-Etsu Chemical and Ibiden rising as investors bet that AI infrastructure spending will keep supporting chip demand. The gains show how Nvidia's results affect more than one company. When demand for AI chips rises, the benefit can spread to foundries, packaging firms, materials suppliers and electronics manufacturers. Still, the move was not uniform. Samsung Electronics and SK Hynix slipped after strong gains a day earlier, as investors took profits and watched labor talks in South Korea. For investors, the next test is whether AI-related orders remain strong through the second half of the year.
details.reason: Nvidia AI 需求看好帶動亞洲供應鏈，鴻海作為代工大廠受惠股價上揚。

details.title: NVIDIA Corporation (NVDA) Gains Momentum on H200 China Clearance
details.content_summary: NVIDIA Corporation (NASDAQ:NVDA) is one of the top tech stocks in billionaire Ken Fisher’s portfolio. On May 14, Reuters reported that the US has cleared 10 Chinese companies to purchase NVIDIA Corporation (NASDAQ:NVDA)’s second-most-powerful AI chip, the H200. However, the report indicates that no deliveries have been made so far, leaving the deal in limbo. According to people familiar with the matter, Alibaba, Tencent, and JD.com are among the companies approved to purchase the H200 chips. A handful of distributors, including Lenovo and Foxconn, have also been approved. The report also indicates that buyers can purchase directly from the chip giant or through intermediaries. Each customer can also purchase up to 75,000 chips under the US Licensing terms. Amid the approval, deals for potential purchases have stalled as Chinese firms have pulled back following guidance from Beijing authorities. Pressure is mounting to block or tightly vet the orders as authorities look to foster their own domestic industry. NVIDIA Corporation (NASDAQ:NVDA) is a leading technology company that specializes in designing and manufacturing Graphics Processing Units (GPUs), alongside developing software for artificial intelligence (AI), high-performance computing, and visualization. It is considered the backbone of the AI industry, providing the essential “mining equipment” (chips and software) needed to power the ongoing AI boom. While we acknowledge the potential of ONTO as an investment, we believe certain AI stocks offer greater upside potential and carry less downside risk. If you're looking for an extremely undervalued AI stock that also stands to benefit significantly from Trump-era tariffs and the onshoring trend, see our free report on the best short-term AI stock. details.reason: 美國批准中國公司採購 H200 AI 晶片，鴻海獲准作為分銷商，但實際交付尚未發生，利多有限。

details.title: Nvidia’s Huang Ignites Asia Tech Rally With AI, Robots Vision
details.content_summary: (Bloomberg) -- The latest report from Nvidia Corp. may have left its investors wanting more but it gave a jolt to the shares of a broad swath of Asian tech companies. Spot the Difference: Putin Gets Trump Treatment From Xi in China Modi’s Toffee Gift to Meloni Ignites Rally in Wrong Indian Stock Iran Threatens to Retaliate Beyond Middle East If US Attacks Nvidia Tells Skeptical Investors AI Is Ready to Go Mainstream Goldman CEO Slides Into Musk’s DMs During Bid to Lead SpaceX IPO A Bloomberg gauge of Asian chipmakers jumped as much as 5.5% after Chief Executive Officer Jensen Huang reinforced the outlook for artificial intelligence, pointing to additional sources of demand and new applications. He also touted prospects for so-called physical AI as humanoids and automated vehicles become more widespread. The comments coincided with a last-minute deal reached by Samsung Electronics Co. and its union to avert a strike, preparations for a stock market listing by OpenAI and news that Anthropic PBC is on pace for its first profitable quarter after experiencing a surge in revenue. “Jensen and Nvidia delivered another masterclass quarter with beats across the board and guidance coming in well above Street expectations,” Wedbush Securities Inc. analyst Dan Ives wrote in a note. The strong forecast brought “greater clarity on the company’s pipeline and backlog over the coming years.” Samsung’s shares jumped 8.5% Thursday in Seoul while those of fellow memory chipmaker and Nvidia supplier SK Hynix Inc. climbed 11%. OpenAI investors SoftBank Group Corp. surged 20% in Tokyo. Shares of Nvidia suppliers Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Co. and Hon Hai Precision Industry Co. gained around 2% and 3% each. Nvidia’s own shares were muted in late New York trading.
details.reason: Nvidia CEO 強調 AI 與實體 AI 前景，帶動亞洲科技股，鴻海股價上漲約 3%。

details.title: 【即時新聞】鴻海成為蘋果發表會核心受惠者 蘋概股表現值得關注 - CMoney投資網誌
details.content_summary:
【即時新聞】鴻海成為蘋果發表會核心受惠者 蘋概股表現值得關注 我們重視「知」的權利
不惜抽絲剝繭、深入調查
只為讓投資人不錯過重要的投資訊息 第一金投顧指出，蘋果發表會中，鴻海為首的蘋概股將是核心受惠族群。台股上周五受美股反彈激勵，終場收漲989點，成交量突破兆元。市場資金正聚焦AI與蘋果相關題材。 分析師表示，蘋果新產品發表會將直接影響鴻海在消費性電子代工的營運動能。鴻海身為全球電子代工服務龍頭，其在蘋果供應鏈的地位使市場將其列為首要觀察標的。 近五日外資與自營商買超合計逾十萬張，三大法人買超金額累計超過二十億。股價自219.5元反彈至250元附近，顯示短期資金回流跡象。 COMPUTEX展與蘋果發表會將是近期重要觀察點。投資人可留意月營收年增率變化及法人持股比例調整。 鴻海2026年4月合併營收為8320.98億元，年增29.74%，連續四個月創高。全年本益比14.4倍，現金股利殖利率2.9%。主要業務涵蓋電腦系統設備、連接器及精密模具，產業地位為全球電子代工服務龍頭。 5月22日外資買超20815張，自營商買超301張，三大法人合計買超21031張。外資近五日累計買超逾10萬張，官股持股比率維持2.74%至2.96%區間，顯示法人買盤回溫。 截至4月30日，股價收219.5元，近60日區間低點187.5元、高點253.5元。MA5位於股價上方，量能較20日均量放大。短線注意乖離過大可能出現回檔。 投資人可持續追蹤月營收年增率及法人買賣超變化。蘋果供應鏈訂單動態與大盤量能將是影響股價的主要變數。
details.reason: 鴻海被視為蘋果發表會核心受惠者，外資大幅買超，顯示資金回流與蘋果相關題材利好。
